title: astragalus kohrudicus
intro: Astragalus kohrudicus, also known as Kohrudi milkvetch, is a species of legume in the genus Astragalus that is native to Iran. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Astragalus kohrudicus include immunomodulatory effects, which can help boost the immune system and protect against infections, as well as anti-fatigue properties, which can help improve physical performance and endurance. Astragalus kohrudicus can be prepared as herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
